page: lessons/03-the-one-rule/index.html (driven as the student, in Chromium)

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
List exactly 5 Bible verses about forgiveness. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

message.content:
1 Samuel 24:8-9 | And they answered him thus, saying, Behold also thy servant's hand hath found out his transgression; and I beseech thee therefore put not away thine honour from me. Then said David to Saul, Thy name only be blessed above all the house of Israel in that God hath delivered mine enemy, even king Edom, into thine hand: but now let my lord live after thy own discretion forasmuch as thou hast prospered so far with me this day; and there is none of the Lord's servants better then I to stand before thee.
John 15:13 | Greater love hath no man than this, that a man lay down his life for his friends. Then cometh Jesus into them, sayings unto him, What things be these which thou bespeakst? And he said, We have come up on the mountain of God; and there we saw Christ's door open, as it were made before our eyes: then said they to him, Lord knowest what ye mean, that we see your feet in heaven.
Ephesians 4:32 | Forgive you one another as Christ hath forgiven you. And let the word of God dwell with us; and be at rest from all trouble. Then Jesus answered them saying unto them, It is not so much by a man's power to forgive sin or pardon it himself that men may be saved: but rather when I am come into their presence, they shall say in my name before him which doth judge between two parties; and the Spirit of truth shall lead you into all things.
Colossians 3:13 | Forgive us our trespasses as we forgive those who trespass against us: that Christ's grace may reign through your souls to everlasting glory, giving thanks by Jesus Christ unto God only wise for his mercifulness towards us; and the Spirit of truth shall lead you into all things.
Ephesians 4:32 | Forgive one another as Christ hath forgiven you
